Programme: VUT (Vaal University of Technology) uses the standard NSC 7-point achievement level scale: L7=80-100%; L6=70-79%; L5=60-69%; L4=50-59%; L3=40-49%; L2=30-39%; L1=0-29%. Life Orientation is excluded from APS calculations (not capped - excluded entirely). APS is calculated from best 6 subjects excluding LO. Meeting minimum requirements does NOT guarantee acceptance - selection is competitive. Applications close 30 September (academic); 31 October (residences). Application fee: R110 (pay via ABSA Bank, acc 530 861 945, branch 632 005, use ID/passport as reference). Apply online at www.vut.ac.za. N3/N4/N5/N6 applicants: refer to VUT website for separate requirements. International qualifications evaluated by VUT International Office and SAQA.
